description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.3 Docker image with a global before_script that runs bundle install and a variable JEKYLL_ENV set to production. Add a test stage containing a test job that executes bundle exec jekyll build -d test, saves the test directory as an artifact, and runs on all branches except master. Add a deploy stage containing a pages job that executes bundle exec jekyll build -d public, publishes the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch.
